mapper.sql: oi.id, oi.order_no as orderNo, oi.appointment_id as appointmentId, oi.customer_id as customerId, c.name as customerName, oi.service_item_id as serviceItemId, si.name as serviceItemName, oi.card_type as cardType, oi.original_amount as originalAmount, oi.discount_amount as discountAmount, oi.amount, oi.paid_amount as paidAmount, oi.debt_amount as debtAmount, oi.monthly_payment as monthlyPayment, oi.payment_method as paymentMethod, oi.debt_status as debtStatus, oi.pay_status as payStatus, oi.order_status as orderStatus, oi.pay_time as payTime, oi.create_time as createTime
mapper.insert: insert into order_info (order_no, appointment_id, customer_id, service_item_id, card_type, original_amount, discount_amount, amount, paid_amount, debt_amount, monthly_payment, payment_method, debt_status, pay_status, order_status, pay_time, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{appointmentId}, #{customerId}, #{serviceItemId}, #{cardType}, #{originalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{amount}, #{paidAmount}, #{debtAmount}, #{monthlyPayment}, #{paymentMethod}, #{debtStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
select
from order_info oi left join customer c on oi.customer_id = c.id left join service_item si on oi.service_item_id = si.id where oi.id = #{id}

select id, order_no as orderNo, appointment_id as appointmentId, customer_id as customerId, service_item_id as serviceItemId, card_type as cardType, original_amount as originalAmount, discount_amount as discountAmount, amount, paid_amount as paidAmount, debt_amount as debtAmount, monthly_payment as monthlyPayment, payment_method as paymentMethod, debt_status as debtStatus, pay_status as payStatus, order_status as orderStatus, pay_time as payTime, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from order_info where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update order_info set pay_status = #{payStatus}, paid_amount = amount, debt_amount = 0, debt_status = #{debtStatus}, pay_time = #{payTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}

update order_info set paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, debt_amount = #{debtAmount}, monthly_payment = #{monthlyPayment}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, debt_status = #{debtStatus}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, pay_time = #{payTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
